title: Bid Live. Win Clean.
subtitle: Every room is KYC-gated. Auto-extend timers fire in the last 60 seconds to prevent sniping. Proxy bidding available.
section_subtitle: Explore our handpicked collection of premium number plates attracting the most attention.
plate_details_1: Premium Dubai plate with verified ownership documentation.
plate_details_2: Eligible for live bidding once your security deposit is verified.
plate_details_3: Transfer handled end-to-end by Mazal concierge after auction close.
deposit_title: Unlock Your Auction Bidding Limit Secure your eligibility with a verified security deposit.
deposit_subtitle: Before participating in premium auctions, you'll need to activate your bidding limit by submitting a refundable security deposit. Once your payment is verified, your bidding limit will be activated instantly.
deposit_method_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to pay.
summary_target_limit: To get a bidding limit of
field_notes_placeholder: Optional notes about this payment method
check_instructions: Prepare the manager's check and schedule a collection. Enter the check number and choose a location, date, and time for pickup.
cash_instructions: Schedule a cash collection. Choose a location, date, and time for our team to collect your deposit.
awaiting_collection_desc: Your collection request has been scheduled. Once the manager's check is received and verified, the amount will be applied to your Auction Bidding Limit.
success_desc: Congratulations! Your payment was successful. Your Auction Bidding Limit has been updated, and you can now start bidding.
